Platform

One ecosystem.
Every format.

From a comic crowdfunding campaign to a game sold through the Bunker launcher — BASE connects every step of an IP's lifecycle in a single infrastructure.

✦

Create

Build your universe. Characters, lore, artbooks, comics, game concepts — all managed as structured IP objects.

⚡

Match

AI-powered matching connects creators with collaborators, publishers, investors, and studios based on your IP's potential.

◈

Fund

Run crowdfunding campaigns with rewards, stretch goals, add-ons, and community tools built for creators.

▶

Play

Distribute indie games through Bunker — the dedicated launcher with 15% take rate. Half of Steam, full stack of BASE.

∞

Expand

Every project feeds the IP graph. Comics become games. Games become universes. Universes become franchises.

Five engines

Built for the
creator economy.

Five engines that make BASE defensible — Match brings the right people together, Ranking drives discovery, Marketplace is where revenue happens, Social builds the fandom, Distribution gets every format to every fan.

⚡ Engine 01

Match

Connect your IP with the right people. BASE's AI matchmaking surfaces collaborators, studios, investors, and publishers based on creative fit — not just skill tags.

AI recommendations by IP DNA
Collaborators, studios, investors
Revenue share + paid + barter
Active listings & proposals
📡 Engine 02

Ranking

Know what's moving. Pulse tracks traction across creators, IPs, campaigns, and games in real time — making BASE itself the discovery engine, no algorithm dependency.

Live momentum scores cross-category
Editorial discovery without SEO
Creators, IPs, campaigns, games
Daily + weekly trend signals
🛒 Engine 03

Marketplace

One storefront for every format. Crowdfunding, digital store, add-ons, subscriptions, collectibles — all under one checkout layer with multi-currency rails. Where the transaction happens.

Crowdfunding + store + add-ons
Bunker · Funktoon · RPG · Gallery
Multi-currency · 8–15% take rate
Physical + digital + licensing
🌐 Engine 04

Social

Follow creators, build fandoms, share lore. BASE's social layer turns audiences into communities and communities into IP fuel.

Creator profiles & follower graphs
Fandom spaces per IP universe
Lore sharing & community tools
Audience → community → IP asset
🚀 Engine 05

Distribution

Your IP, everywhere it belongs. BASE connects games, comics, books, and tabletop to the audiences, platforms, and communities built for them — so every format finds its fans.

Games via Bunker desktop launcher
Editorial placements & promotion
Partner channels & communities
Cross-format IP reach

Team

Built by people
who've done it.

Cinema, streaming, publishing, and software engineering — the founding team brings operational experience across every vertical BASE operates in.

GW

Gabriel Wainer

CEO & Founder

5 years as Executive Director at Downtown Filmes. Co-founder of Guará studio (O Doutrinador, Zico, Crisálida). HQMix 2022 Best National Publisher with Aquarius distributed via Prime Video and TV operators.

FL

Fernando Leôncio

CTO

Principal Software Engineer specializing in multi-platform architecture across Web, Mobile, and TV. Leading scalable systems and AI infrastructure for BASE — the full technical stack from Next.js to GCP Cloud SQL.

PC

Pedro Curi

VP & Co-founder

Film producer and co-founder of Funktoon and BASE. Brings production experience and creative IP development expertise to the platform's content strategy and creator acquisition.

Use of funds

Rollout strategy

Why now
Creator economy is fragmenting. AI enables two-person teams to build platform-grade products. LatAm market is underserved and growing. The window to establish infrastructure-level position is open.
